result: The schedule_template representation IS EMITTABLE: build_gemm_lds2 DBUF=1 emits a PIPELINED, correct (rel_rmse 2.05e-4), no-spill K-loop within the 256-VGPR envelope (~236). The detector accepts it (16/32 loads in the wmma span).
register_pool_caveat: The DEEPER Tensile-class pipeline (full A+B prefetch, PLRAB) hits the 256-VGPR static wall (300). And DBUF alone REGRESSES in-model speed (prior Phase B: -0.7..-2.7%, L2-contention/occupancy). So the representation EMITS the primitive but the full whole-prefill SPEED match needs a register POOL (dynamic VGPR lifetime), not just the schedule template.
